value:
Splendid!
You're moving up to the Silver League.
I wonder what opponents await you in the fights ahead.

Splendid!
You've fought your way into the Gold League.
I hope you're ready—your opponents are only getting tougher!

Splendid!
Congratulations! You're in the Gold League now!
Will this momentum carry you into the Platinum League as well?

Splendid!
Now, then, the Diamond League is next!
Only the strongest make it this far! Good luck!

Splendid!
Well, then, if it isn't the main event!
Now you challenge the Master League!

You clumsy fool!
Bah! You cannot possibly be satisfied with a score like that!
Come now, show me how strong you really are!
